description: Compare the out-of-sample predictive performance of an AR(1) model and an AR(4) model for US Inflation ('inf') using the 'usa.gdt' dataset. Use the training sample 1984:1 to 2005:4 to generate dynamic forecasts for the period 2006:1 to 2009:3. Calculate the Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) for both models over the forecast period and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/rmse_report.txt containing the RMSE for each model and identifying which model performed better based on the lower RMSE.

metadata.ground_truth_logic: AR(1) and AR(4) RMSE comparison on POE5 USA data
